<!doctype html>
<html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Luxury Custom Home — Walkthrough</title>
<style>
html,body{margin:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#111;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;touch-action:none;overscroll-behavior:none;-webkit-user-select:none;user-select:none}canvas{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;touch-action:none;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#86a9bf 0%,#c8d1d2 45%,#b8ad98 72%,#4b5149 100%)}
#ui{position:fixed;z-index:20;left:16px;top:16px;background:rgba(10,10,10,.72);color:#fff;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:10px;max-width:430px;line-height:1.35;font-size:13px;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}
#ui b{font-size:15px}#status{margin-top:7px;color:#ead9b6}#enter{margin-top:8px;padding:7px 10px;border:0;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer}#ui.hidden{display:none}
#quickToggles{position:fixed;z-index:45;right:max(16px,env(safe-area-inset-right));top:max(16px,env(safe-area-inset-top));display:flex;gap:8px;pointer-events:auto}
.hudToggle{padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.34);border-radius:10px;background:rgba(12,12,12,.64);color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.3px;cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(9px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.24);touch-action:manipulation}.hudToggle:active,.hudToggle.active{background:rgba(216,201,167,.80);color:#111;transform:scale(.98)}#toggleTools{display:none}
#mobileControls{display:none;position:fixed;z-index:30;inset:0;pointer-events:none}
#dpad{position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:max(16px,env(safe-area-inset-bottom));width:150px;height:150px;transform:translateX(-50%);pointer-events:auto;opacity:.46;transition:opacity .16s ease}
#dpad:active,#dpad:hover{opacity:.76}
.touchBtn{position:absolute;width:52px;height:52px;margin:0;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(12,12,12,.30);color:rgba(255,255,255,.78);font-size:24px;font-weight:700;backdrop-filter:blur(7px);box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.18);touch-action:none;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
.touchBtn:active,.touchBtn.active{background:rgba(216,201,167,.70);color:#111;opacity:1;transform:scale(.96)}
#moveForward{left:49px;top:0}#moveLeft{left:0;top:49px}#moveBack{left:49px;top:98px}#moveRight{left:98px;top:49px}
#mobileActions{position:absolute;right:max(12px,env(safe-area-inset-right));bottom:max(12px,env(safe-area-inset-bottom));display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,64px);gap:7px;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(5,7,8,.28);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);pointer-events:auto;opacity:.46;transition:opacity .16s ease,transform .16s ease}
#mobileActions:hover,#mobileActions:active{opacity:.76}#mobileActions.hidden{opacity:0;transform:translateX(115%);pointer-events:none}
.actionBtn{position:static;width:64px;height:46px;margin:0;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.26);border-radius:13px;background:rgba(12,12,12,.30);color:rgba(255,255,255,.78);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.25px;backdrop-filter:blur(7px);touch-action:none;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
.actionBtn:active,.actionBtn.active{background:rgba(216,201,167,.76);color:#111;transform:scale(.96)}
#lookHint{position:absolute;z-index:34;left:50%;bottom:172px;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:1px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(8,10,12,.22);color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);font-size:10px;line-height:1.08;text-align:center;text-shadow:0 2px 8px #000;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap}
@media (pointer:coarse),(max-width:820px){
  #mobileControls{display:block}#toggleTools{display:block}
  #quickToggles{top:max(8px,env(safe-area-inset-top));right:max(8px,env(safe-area-inset-right));gap:6px}
  .hudToggle{font-size:10px;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:9px}
  #ui{left:8px;right:8px;top:52px;max-width:none;padding:10px 12px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.34;max-height:42vh;overflow:auto}
  #ui b{font-size:13px}#enter{display:none}
}
@media (max-width:540px){#mobileActions{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,58px)}.actionBtn{width:58px;height:43px;font-size:9px}#dpad{transform:translateX(-50%) scale(.90);transform-origin:center bottom;bottom:max(10px,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}#lookHint{bottom:154px}}
@media (max-width:390px){#mobileActions{right:6px;bottom:6px;padding:6px;gap:5px}.actionBtn{width:54px;height:40px}#dpad{left:50%}#lookHint{bottom:151px;font-size:9px}}
</style></head><body><canvas id="gl"></canvas>
<div id="ui"><b>Luxury Custom Home — Walkthrough Controls</b><br>
<b>Move:</b> Arrow keys/WASD or the mobile D-pad. Hold <b>Q</b> with arrows to turn/look; mouse or one-finger drag also looks.<br>
<b>Walk:</b> keeps you planted on the floors and stairs for a normal room-by-room tour. <b>Fly:</b> unlocks vertical movement so you can rise, descend, and inspect the exterior. Use <b>Up/Down</b> only while flying; <b>Exterior</b> jumps straight to an aerial view.<br>
<b>Roof / Slabs:</b> show or hide those building layers. <b>Reset:</b> returns to the front entry. Mouse wheel or two-finger pinch zooms.<br>
Desktop shortcuts: Shift run • F fly • E exterior • Space/C altitude • R roof • U slabs • X reset • I info.<br>
<button id="enter">Enter Walkthrough</button><div id="status">Walk mode • Roof visible • Upper slabs visible • Zoom 70°</div></div>
<div id="quickToggles" aria-label="Display toggles">
  <button class="hudToggle" id="toggleUI" aria-pressed="false" title="Show or hide instructions">INFO ON</button>
  <button class="hudToggle" id="toggleTools" aria-pressed="false" title="Show or hide mobile tools">TOOLS ON</button>
</div>
<div id="mobileControls" aria-label="Mobile walkthrough controls">
  <div id="dpad" aria-label="Movement controls">
    <button class="touchBtn" id="moveForward" aria-label="Move forward">▲</button>
    <button class="touchBtn" id="moveLeft" aria-label="Move left">◀</button>
    <button class="touchBtn" id="moveBack" aria-label="Move backward">▼</button>
    <button class="touchBtn" id="moveRight" aria-label="Move right">▶</button>
  </div>
  <div id="lookHint"><span>Drag: look</span><span>Pinch: zoom</span></div>
  <div id="mobileActions" aria-label="Optional walkthrough tools">
    <button class="actionBtn" id="runBtn" title="Hold for faster movement">RUN</button>
    <button class="actionBtn" id="flyBtn" title="Switch from walk mode to free-flight mode">FLY</button>
    <button class="actionBtn" id="riseBtn" title="Gain altitude while flying">UP</button>
    <button class="actionBtn" id="lowerBtn" title="Lose altitude while flying">DOWN</button>
    <button class="actionBtn" id="exteriorBtn" title="Jump to an aerial exterior view">EXTERIOR</button>
    <button class="actionBtn" id="roofBtn" title="Show or hide the roof">ROOF</button>
    <button class="actionBtn" id="upperBtn" title="Show or hide upper-floor slabs">SLABS</button>
    <button class="actionBtn" id="resetBtn" title="Return to the front entry">RESET</button>
  </div>
</div>
<script id="data" 39,3.3528,7.3152,7.3914,6.096],[2.9718,7.3152,3.3528,3.1242,8.8392,6.096],[2.9718,8.8392,5.6388,3.1242,9.7536,6.096],[2.9718,9.7536,3.3528,3.1242,11.5824,6.096],[5.4102,7.3152,3.3528,5.5626,8.8392,6.096],[5.4102,8.8392,5.6388,5.5626,9.7536,6.096],[5.4102,9.7536,3.3528,5.5626,11.5824,6.096],[14.6304,7.239,3.3528,15.5448,7.3914,6.096],[15.5448,7.239,5.6388,16.4592,7.3914,6.096],[16.4592,7.239,3.3528,21.9456,7.3914,6.096],[18.8214,7.3152,3.3528,18.9738,8.8392,6.096],[18.8214,8.8392,5.6388,18.9738,9.7536,6.096],[18.8214,9.7536,3.3528,18.9738,11.5824,6.096],[0.0,11.5062,3.3528,5.4864,11.6586,6.096],[5.4864,11.5062,5.7912,6.7056,11.6586,6.096],[6.7056,11.5062,3.3528,7.3152,11.6586,6.096],[14.6304,11.5062,3.3528,15.24,11.6586,6.096],[15.24,11.5062,5.7912,16.4592,11.6586,6.096],[16.4592,11.5062,3.3528,21.9456,11.6586,6.096],[7.3152,4.60553,3.2766,14.6304,4.66039,4.4958],[7.3152,11.61593,3.2766,16.4592,11.67079,4.4958],[7.34873,4.572,3.2766,7.40359,11.5824,4.4958],[14.54201,4.572,3.2766,14.59687,11.5824,4.4958],[10.39673,14.6304,3.2766,10.45159,19.5072,4.4958],[13.93241,14.6304,3.2766,13.98727,19.5072,4.4958],[10.3632,19.54073,3.2766,14.0208,19.59559,4.4958],[1.2192,-0.01524,4.1148,3.3528,0.01524,5.7912],[4.2672,-0.01524,4.1148,6.4008,0.01524,5.7912],[15.8496,-0.01524,4.1148,17.9832,0.01524,5.7912],[18.8976,-0.01524,4.1148,21.0312,0.01524,5.7912],[9.144,-0.01524,4.1148,12.8016,0.01524,5.7912],[-0.01524,1.524,4.1148,0.01524,5.1816,5.7912],[-0.01524,12.8016,4.1148,0.01524,16.4592,5.7912],[21.93036,1.524,4.1148,21.96084,5.1816,5.7912],[21.93036,12.8016,4.1148,21.96084,16.4592,5.7912],[1.524,18.27276,3.5052,6.096,18.30324,5.9436],[15.8496,18.27276,3.5052,20.7264,18.30324,5.9436],[7.239,4.572,3.2004,7.3914,6.096,6.4008],[7.239,6.096,3.2004,7.3914,13.4112,3.81],[7.239,6.096,5.9436,7.3914,13.4112,6.4008],[7.239,13.4112,3.2004,7.3914,14.6304,6.4008],[16.383,4.572,3.2004,16.5354,6.096,6.4008],[16.383,6.096,3.2004,16.5354,13.4112,3.81],[16.383,6.096,5.9436,16.5354,13.4112,6.4008],[16.383,13.4112,3.2004,16.5354,14.6304,6.4008],[7.29996,6.096,3.81,7.33044,13.4112,5.9436],[16.44396,6.096,3.81,16.47444,13.4112,5.9436],[19.64436,6.7056,0.1524,19.67484,8.5344,2.4384],[19.5072,18.12036,0.1524,21.336,18.15084,2.286],[0.3048,8.82396,3.3528,2.1336,8.85444,5.4864],[19.812,8.82396,3.3528,21.6408,8.85444,5.4864]]}</script>
<script>
const data=JSON.parse(document.getElementById('data').textContent), canvas=document.getElementById('gl'), gl=canvas.getContext('webgl2',{antialias:true})||canvas.getContext('webgl');
if(!gl) alert('WebGL is required.');
const vs=`attribute vec3 p;attribute vec3 n;attribute vec4 c;uniform mat4 mvp;varying vec4 vc;varying vec3 vn;void main(){gl_Position=mvp*vec4(p,1.0);vc=c;vn=n;}`;
const fs=`precision mediump float;varying vec4 vc;varying vec3 vn;void main(){vec3 n=normalize(vn);vec3 sun=normalize(vec3(.38,.26,.89));vec3 fill=normalize(vec3(-.62,.42,.48));float key=max(dot(n,sun),0.0);float soft=max(dot(n,fill),0.0);float hemi=.5+.5*n.z;float light=.30+.56*key+.18*soft+.13*hemi;vec3 col=vc.rgb*light;col=pow(max(col,vec3(0.0)),vec3(.92));gl_FragColor=vec4(col,vc.a);}`;
function shader(type,src){let s=gl.createShader(type);gl.shaderSource(s,src);gl.compileShader(s);if(!gl.getShaderParameter(s,gl.COMPILE_STATUS))throw gl.getShaderInfoLog(s);return s}
let prog=gl.createProgram();gl.attachShader(prog,shader(gl.VERTEX_SHADER,vs));gl.attachShader(prog,shader(gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,fs));gl.linkProgram(prog);gl.useProgram(prog);
function buf(name,arr,size){let b=gl.createBuffer();gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER,b);gl.bufferData(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER,new Float32Array(arr),gl.STATIC_DRAW);let loc=gl.getAttribLocation(prog,name);gl.enableVertexAttribArray(loc);gl.vertexAttribPointer(loc,size,gl.FLOAT,false,0,0);return b}
buf('p',data.vertices,3);buf('n',data.normals,3);buf('c',data.colors,4);let use32=data.vertices.length/3>65535;const itype=use32?gl.UNSIGNED_INT:gl.UNSIGNED_SHORT;function makeIB(arr){let b=gl.createBuffer();gl.bindBuffer(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER,b);gl.bufferData(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER,use32?new Uint32Array(arr):new Uint16Array(arr),gl.STATIC_DRAW);return {buffer:b,count:arr.length}}const ibMain=makeIB(data.mainIndices),ibRoof=makeIB(data.roofIndices),ibUpper=makeIB(data.upperIndices);
const locM=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'mvp');gl.enable(gl.DEPTH_TEST);gl.enable(gl.CULL_FACE);gl.cullFace(gl.BACK);gl.enable(gl.BLEND);gl.blendFunc(gl.SRC_ALPHA,gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA);
let pos=[36*.3048,-12*.3048,1.75],yaw=0,pitch=0,fov=70,keys={},fly=false,showRoof=true,showUpper=true,last=performance.now();
const eye=1.68, upperFloor=10.75*.3048;
function upperAt(x,y){x/=.3048;y/=.3048;return (x>=0&&x<=24&&y>=0&&y<=60)||(x>=48&&x<=72&&y>=0&&y<=60)||(x>=24&&x<=48&&y>=0&&y<=15)||(x>=24&&x<=54&&y>=38&&y<=46)||(x>=24&&x<=34&&y>=46&&y<=70)||(x>=34&&x<=46&&y>=64&&y<=70)}
function floorZ(x,y,currentZ){let xf=x/.3048,yf=y/.3048;if(xf>=25&&xf<=33&&yf>=46&&yf<=64) return (0.5+(yf-46)/18*10)*.3048+eye; if(currentZ>2.5&&upperAt(x,y))return upperFloor+eye; return .5*.3048+eye}
function collides(x,y,z){let r=.23;for(const b of data.collisions){if(x>b[0]-r&&x<b[3]+r&&y>b[1]-r&&y<b[4]+r&&z>b[2]&&z<b[5]+eye*.75)return true}return false}
function resize(){let d=devicePixelRatio||1,w=innerWidth*d,h=innerHeight*d;if(canvas.width!==w||canvas.height!==h){canvas.width=w;canvas.height=h;gl.viewport(0,0,w,h)}}
function perspective(fovy,a,n,f){let t=1/Math.tan(fovy/2),nf=1/(n-f);return [t/a,0,0,0,0,t,0,0,0,0,(f+n)*nf,-1,0,0,2*f*n*nf,0]}
function lookAt(e,c,u){let zx=e[0]-c[0],zy=e[1]-c[1],zz=e[2]-c[2],zl=Math.hypot(zx,zy,zz);zx/=zl;zy/=zl;zz/=zl;let xx=u[1]*zz-u[2]*zy,xy=u[2]*zx-u[0]*zz,xz=u[0]*zy-u[1]*zx,xl=Math.hypot(xx,xy,xz);xx/=xl;xy/=xl;xz/=xl;let yx=zy*xz-zz*xy,yy=zz*xx-zx*xz,yz=zx*xy-zy*xx;return [xx,yx,zx,0,xy,yy,zy,0,xz,yz,zz,0,-(xx*e[0]+xy*e[1]+xz*e[2]),-(yx*e[0]+yy*e[1]+yz*e[2]),-(zx*e[0]+zy*e[1]+zz*e[2]),1]}
function mul(a,b){let o=new Array(16).fill(0);for(let c=0;c<4;c++)for(let r=0;r<4;r++)for(let k=0;k<4;k++)o[c*4+r]+=a[k*4+r]*b[c*4+k];return o}
function update(dt){let sp=((keys.ShiftLeft||keys.ShiftRight||keys.MobileRun)?9:4.2)*dt,turnMode=keys.KeyQ,turnSpeed=1.85*dt,lookSpeed=1.35*dt;if(turnMode){if(keys.ArrowLeft)yaw-=turnSpeed;if(keys.ArrowRight)yaw+=turnSpeed;if(keys.ArrowUp)pitch=Math.min(1.45,pitch+lookSpeed);if(keys.ArrowDown)pitch=Math.max(-1.45,pitch-lookSpeed)}let fx=Math.sin(yaw),fy=Math.cos(yaw),rx=Math.cos(yaw),ry=-Math.sin(yaw),dx=0,dy=0;if(keys.KeyW||(!turnMode&&keys.ArrowUp)||keys.MobileForward){dx+=fx*sp;dy+=fy*sp}if(keys.KeyS||(!turnMode&&keys.ArrowDown)||keys.MobileBack){dx-=fx*sp;dy-=fy*sp}if(keys.KeyA||(!turnMode&&keys.ArrowLeft)||keys.MobileLeft){dx-=rx*sp;dy-=ry*sp}if(keys.KeyD||(!turnMode&&keys.ArrowRight)||keys.MobileRight){dx+=rx*sp;dy+=ry*sp}let nx=pos[0]+dx,ny=pos[1]+dy,nz=pos[2];if(fly){if(keys.Space||keys.MobileRise)nz+=sp;if(keys.KeyC||keys.ControlLeft||keys.ControlRight||keys.MobileLower)nz-=sp}else nz=floorZ(nx,ny,pos[2]);if(!collides(nx,pos[1],nz))pos[0]=nx;if(!collides(pos[0],ny,nz))pos[1]=ny;pos[2]=nz}
function drawSet(set){gl.bindBuffer(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER,set.buffer);gl.drawElements(gl.TRIANGLES,set.count,itype,0)}function drawRanges(){drawSet(ibMain);if(showUpper)drawSet(ibUpper);if(showRoof)drawSet(ibRoof)}
function frame(t){resize();let dt=Math.min(.05,(t-last)/1000);last=t;update(dt);gl.clearColor(0,0,0,0);gl.clear(gl.COLOR_BUFFER_BIT|gl.DEPTH_BUFFER_BIT);let dir=[Math.sin(yaw)*Math.cos(pitch),Math.cos(yaw)*Math.cos(pitch),Math.sin(pitch)],v=lookAt(pos,[pos[0]+dir[0],pos[1]+dir[1],pos[2]+dir[2]],[0,0,1]),p=perspective(fov*Math.PI/180,canvas.width/canvas.height,.05,500),m=mul(p,v);gl.uniformMatrix4fv(locM,false,new Float32Array(m));drawRanges();requestAnimationFrame(frame)}
function clamp(v,a,b){return Math.max(a,Math.min(b,v))}
function status(){document.getElementById('status').textContent=(fly?'Fly mode':'Walk mode')+' • '+(showRoof?'Roof visible':'Roof hidden')+' • '+(showUpper?'Upper slabs visible':'Upper slabs hidden')+' • Zoom '+Math.round(fov)+'°';const fb=document.getElementById('flyBtn');if(fb){fb.textContent=fly?'WALK':'FLY';fb.title=fly?'Return to floor-following walk mode':'Switch to free-flight mode for vertical movement'}}
function resetView(){pos=[36*.3048,-12*.3048,1.75];yaw=0;pitch=0;fov=70;fly=false;status()}
function exteriorView(){pos=[6,-28,13];yaw=0;pitch=-.24;fov=76;fly=true;status()}
function toggleFly(){fly=!fly;status()}
function toggleRoof(){showRoof=!showRoof;status()}
function toggleUpper(){showUpper=!showUpper;status()}
function adjustZoom(delta){fov=clamp(fov+delta,34,100);status()}
const coarse=matchMedia('(pointer:coarse)').matches||navigator.maxTouchPoints>0;
const enterBtn=document.getElementById('enter');
const uiCard=document.getElementById('ui');
const toggleUIBtn=document.getElementById('toggleUI');
const toggleToolsBtn=document.getElementById('toggleTools');
const mobileActions=document.getElementById('mobileActions');
function syncUIBtn(){const hidden=uiCard.classList.contains('hidden');toggleUIBtn.textContent=hidden?'INFO OFF':'INFO ON';toggleUIBtn.classList.toggle('active',!hidden);toggleUIBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed',hidden?'true':'false')}
function toggleUI(){uiCard.classList.toggle('hidden');syncUIBtn()}
function syncToolsBtn(){const hidden=mobileActions.classList.contains('hidden');toggleToolsBtn.textContent=hidden?'TOOLS OFF':'TOOLS ON';toggleToolsBtn.classList.toggle('active',!hidden);toggleToolsBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed',hidden?'true':'false')}
function toggleTools(){mobileActions.classList.toggle('hidden');syncToolsBtn()}
toggleUIBtn.addEventListener('click',e=>{e.preventDefault();toggleUI()});
toggleToolsBtn.addEventListener('click',e=>{e.preventDefault();toggleTools()});
syncUIBtn();syncToolsBtn();
enterBtn.onclick=()=>{if(canvas.requestPointerLock)canvas.requestPointerLock()};
canvas.addEventListener('click',()=>{if(!coarse&&canvas.requestPointerLock)canvas.requestPointerLock()});
const blockedKeys=new Set(['ArrowUp','ArrowDown','ArrowLeft','ArrowRight','Space','KeyQ']);
addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(blockedKeys.has(e.code))e.preventDefault();keys[e.code]=true;if(e.repeat)return;if(e.code==='KeyF')toggleFly();if(e.code==='KeyE')exteriorView();if(e.code==='KeyR')toggleRoof();if(e.code==='KeyU')toggleUpper();if(e.code==='KeyX')resetView();if(e.code==='KeyI')toggleUI();if(e.code==='KeyT')toggleTools()},{passive:false});
addEventListener('keyup',e=>{if(blockedKeys.has(e.code))e.preventDefault();keys[e.code]=false},{passive:false});
addEventListener('blur',()=>{for(const k in keys)keys[k]=false});
addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{if(document.pointerLockElement===canvas){yaw-=e.movementX*.0022;pitch-=e.movementY*.0022;pitch=Math.max(-1.45,Math.min(1.45,pitch))}});
canvas.addEventListener('wheel',e=>{e.preventDefault();adjustZoom(e.deltaY*.035)},{passive:false});
function bindHold(id,key){const el=document.getElementById(id);let pointer=null;const down=e=>{e.preventDefault();pointer=e.pointerId;el.setPointerCapture?.(pointer);keys[key]=true;el.classList.add('active')};const up=e=>{if(pointer!==null&&e.pointerId!==pointer)return;e.preventDefault();keys[key]=false;el.classList.remove('active');pointer=null};el.addEventListener('pointerdown',down,{passive:false});el.addEventListener('pointerup',up,{passive:false});el.addEventListener('pointercancel',up,{passive:false});el.addEventListener('lostpointercapture',()=>{keys[key]=false;el.classList.remove('active');pointer=null})}
bindHold('moveForward','MobileForward');bindHold('moveBack','MobileBack');bindHold('moveLeft','MobileLeft');bindHold('moveRight','MobileRight');bindHold('runBtn','MobileRun');bindHold('riseBtn','MobileRise');bindHold('lowerBtn','MobileLower');
function bindTap(id,fn){const el=document.getElementById(id);el.addEventListener('pointerdown',e=>{e.preventDefault();el.classList.add('active')},{passive:false});el.addEventListener('pointerup',e=>{e.preventDefault();el.classList.remove('active');fn()},{passive:false});el.addEventListener('pointercancel',()=>el.classList.remove('active'))}
bindTap('flyBtn',toggleFly);bindTap('exteriorBtn',exteriorView);bindTap('roofBtn',toggleRoof);bindTap('upperBtn',toggleUpper);bindTap('resetBtn',resetView);
const sceneTouches=new Map();let lastPinchDistance=null;
function touchDistance(){const pts=[...sceneTouches.values()];if(pts.length<2)return null;return Math.hypot(pts[0].x-pts[1].x,pts[0].y-pts[1].y)}
canvas.addEventListener('pointerdown',e=>{if(e.pointerType==='mouse')return;e.preventDefault();sceneTouches.set(e.pointerId,{x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY});canvas.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId);lastPinchDistance=touchDistance()},{passive:false});
canvas.addEventListener('pointermove',e=>{if(!sceneTouches.has(e.pointerId))return;e.preventDefault();const old=sceneTouches.get(e.pointerId);sceneTouches.set(e.pointerId,{x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY});if(sceneTouches.size===1){const dx=e.clientX-old.x,dy=e.clientY-old.y;yaw-=dx*.006;pitch-=dy*.006;pitch=clamp(pitch,-1.45,1.45)}else{const d=touchDistance();if(lastPinchDistance!==null&&d!==null)adjustZoom((lastPinchDistance-d)*.075);lastPinchDistance=d}},{passive:false});
function endLook(e){sceneTouches.delete(e.pointerId);lastPinchDistance=touchDistance()}
canvas.addEventListener('pointerup',endLook);canvas.addEventListener('pointercancel',endLook);canvas.addEventListener('lostpointercapture',endLook);
requestAnimationFrame(frame);
</script></body></html>
